scripts.build: vite build --mode client && vite build && cp public/wasm/linalg_wasm_bg.wasm dist/linalg_wasm_bg.wasm
scripts.build:wasm: cd linalg-wasm && wasm-pack build --target web && mkdir -p ../public/wasm && cp -r pkg/. ../public/wasm/
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run build:wasm && wrangler deploy
